# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration for Automated Backups

# S3 Repository Configuration
s3_repository_config:
  repository_name: "backup_repository_s3"
  type: "s3"
  settings:
    bucket: "elasticsearch-snapshots-prod"
    region: "us-east-1"
    base_path: "elasticsearch/snapshots"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "1gb"
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
    readonly: false
    server_side_encryption: true
    storage_class: "standard_ia"
    canned_acl: "private"
    # Use IAM roles instead of access keys for security
    client: "default"

# File Share Repository Configuration (NFS/CIFS)
file_repository_config:
  repository_name: "backup_repository_fs"
  type: "fs"
  settings:
    location: "/mnt/elasticsearch_backups"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "1gb"
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
    readonly: false

# Azure Blob Storage Repository Configuration
azure_repository_config:
  repository_name: "backup_repository_azure"
  type: "azure"
  settings:
    container: "elasticsearch-snapshots"
    base_path: "snapshots"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "1gb"
    readonly: false
    # Use managed identity instead of account keys
    client: "default"

# Snapshot Lifecycle Management (SLM) Policies
slm_policies:
  daily_snapshot:
    name: "daily-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 2 * * *"  # Daily at 2 AM
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    config:
      indices:
        - "*"
        - "-.*"  # Exclude system indices
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated-slm"
        purpose: "daily-backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "30d"
      min_count: 7
      max_count: 30

  weekly_snapshot:
    name: "weekly-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 3 * * 0"  # Weekly on Sunday at 3 AM
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    config:
      indices:
        - "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated-slm"
        purpose: "weekly-backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "90d"
      min_count: 4
      max_count: 12

  monthly_snapshot:
    name: "monthly-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 4 1 * *"  # Monthly on 1st at 4 AM
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    config:
      indices:
        - "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated-slm"
        purpose: "monthly-backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "365d"
      min_count: 12
      max_count: 24

# Manual Snapshot Configuration
manual_snapshot_config:
  snapshot_name_pattern: "snapshot-{now/d}"
  indices:
    - "logs-*"
    - "metrics-*"
    - "application-*"
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: true
  partial: false
  wait_for_completion: false

# Restoration Configuration
restoration_config:
  default_settings:
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    include_aliases: true
    partial: false
    index_settings:
      index.number_of_replicas: 1
    ignore_index_settings:
      - "index.refresh_interval"

  point_in_time_restore:
    rename_pattern: "restored-(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored-$1"
    include_global_state: false

# Security Configuration
security_config:
  # Elasticsearch keystore settings for S3
  keystore_settings:
    - key: "s3.client.default.access_key"
      value_from_env: "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID"
      secure: true
    - key: "s3.client.default.secret_key"
      value_from_env: "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY"
      secure: true
    - key: "s3.client.default.session_token"
      value_from_env: "AWS_SESSION_TOKEN"
      secure: true

  # Azure keystore settings
  azure_keystore_settings:
    - key: "azure.client.default.account"
      value_from_env: "AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT"
      secure: true
    - key: "azure.client.default.key"
      value_from_env: "AZURE_STORAGE_KEY"
      secure: true

  # File system permissions
  filesystem_security:
    backup_directory: "/mnt/elasticsearch_backups"
    owner: "elasticsearch"
    group: "elasticsearch"
    permissions: "0750"

  # Encryption at rest
  encryption:
    s3_server_side_encryption: true
    azure_encryption: true
    filesystem_encryption: true

  # Access control
  rbac:
    snapshot_role:
      cluster:
        - "manage_slm"
        - "create_snapshot"
        - "monitor"
      indices:
        - names: ["*"]
          privileges: ["all"]

    restore_role:
      cluster:
        - "manage"
        - "monitor"
      indices:
        - names: ["*"]
          privileges: ["all"]

    readonly_snapshot_role:
      cluster:
        - "monitor"
      indices:
        - names: ["*"]
          privileges: ["read"]

# Monitoring and Alerting
monitoring_config:
  snapshot_status_check:
    enabled: true
    interval: "5m"
    alert_on_failure: true

  slm_health_check:
    enabled: true
    interval: "10m"
    alert_on_policy_failure: true

  repository_verification:
    enabled: true
    interval: "1h"
    alert_on_verification_failure: true

  metrics:
    - snapshot_duration
    - snapshot_size
    - snapshot_success_rate
    - repository_health
    - restore_duration

# Notification Configuration
notification_config:
  email:
    enabled: true
    recipients:
      - "ops-team@company.com"
      - "dba-team@company.com"
    on_events:
      - "snapshot_failure"
      - "restore_failure"
      - "repository_verification_failure"

  slack:
    enabled: true
    webhook_url_from_env: "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"
    channel: "#elasticsearch-ops"
    on_events:
      - "snapshot_failure"
      - "restore_failure"

  pagerduty:
    enabled: true
    integration_key_from_env: "PAGERDUTY_INTEGRATION_KEY"
    on_events:
      - "snapshot_failure"
      - "restore_failure"

# Elasticsearch Configuration (elasticsearch.yml additions)
elasticsearch_yml_config:
  path.repo:
    - "/mnt/elasticsearch_backups"
    - "/mnt/nfs_backups"

  # S3 repository plugin settings
  s3.client.default.protocol: "https"
  s3.client.default.read_timeout: "50s"
  s3.client.default.max_retries: 3
  s3.client.default.use_throttle_retries: true

  # Snapshot thread pool settings
  thread_pool.snapshot.core: 4
  thread_pool.snapshot.max: 8
  thread_pool.snapshot.keep_alive: "5m"

# Backup Verification Script Configuration
verification_config:
  enabled: true
  schedule: "0 6 * * *"  # Daily at 6 AM
  test_restore:
    enabled: true
    target_cluster: "test-cluster"
    indices_to_test:
      - "sample-index-*"
    cleanup_after_test: true

# Disaster Recovery Configuration
disaster_recovery:
  cross_region_replication:
    enabled: true
    source_repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    target_repository: "backup_repository_s3_dr"
    target_region: "us-west-2"
    replication_schedule: "0 8 * * *"

  recovery_time_objective: "4h"
  recovery_point_objective: "24h"

  failover_procedure:
    - step: "verify_target_cluster_health"
    - step: "restore_latest_snapshot"
    - step: "verify_data_integrity"
    - step: "update_dns_records"
    - step: "notify_stakeholders"

# Retention Policy
retention_policy:
  daily_snapshots:
    keep_last: 7
    keep_daily: 30
    keep_weekly: 12
    keep_monthly: 24
    keep_yearly: 5

  cleanup_schedule: "0 5 * * *"  # Daily at 5 AM
  
  size_based_retention:
    enabled: true
    max_repository_size: "5TB"
    cleanup_strategy: "oldest_first"

# Performance Tuning
performance_config:
  snapshot:
    max_concurrent_operations: 5
    chunk_size: "1gb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
    
  restore:
    max_concurrent_operations: 3
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
    
  network:
    tcp_keep_alive: true
    tcp_no_delay: true
    connection_timeout: "30s"

# Audit Configuration
audit_config:
  enabled: true
  log_snapshot_operations: true
  log_restore_operations: true
  log_repository_operations: true
  audit_log_path: "/var/log/elasticsearch/snapshot_audit.log"
  retention_days: 90

# API Endpoints for Operations
api_operations:
  create_repository:
    method: "PUT"
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/{repository}"
    
  create_snapshot:
    method: "PUT"
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}"
    
  get_snapshot_status:
    method: "GET"
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}/_status"
    
  restore_snapshot:
    method: "POST"
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}/_restore"
    
  delete_snapshot:
    method: "DELETE"
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}"
    
  verify_repository:
    method: "POST"
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/{repository}/_verify"

# Troubleshooting Configuration
troubleshooting:
  common_issues:
    - issue: "snapshot_in_progress_exception"
      resolution: "wait_for_completion_or_cancel"
    - issue: "repository_verification_exception"
      resolution: "check_permissions_and_connectivity"
    - issue: "concurrent_snapshot_execution_exception"
      resolution: "adjust_slm_schedules"

  debug_logging:
    enabled: false
    log_level: "DEBUG"
    categories:
      - "org.elasticsearch.snapshots"
      - "org.elasticsearch.repositories"

# Documentation Links
documentation:
  snapshot_restore_guide: "https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/snapshot-restore.html"
  slm_guide: "https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/snapshot-lifecycle-management.html"
  s3_repository_plugin: "https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/plugins/current/repository-s3.html"
